creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
Add devel/py-jsonschema to the broken list. The current version, which has been committed to the tree, has fully converted to PEP-517 and no longer uses setuptools as its build system (uses devel/py-hatchling). The proper fix for this and an increasing amount of packages (maybe including the current broken set in these exp-runs) is PEP-517 framework support. Waiting on available cycles after this month's conference circuit to resume work on it.

https://wiki.freebsd.org/Python/PEP-517
